title: Summer Camp 2024
description: Fun-filled summer camp with art, play, and creative activities for children aged 2-5
details: Join us for an exciting summer experience filled with outdoor play, art workshops, storytelling, and nature exploration.

title: Art Workshop
description: Creative art workshop for children of all ages
details: Explore various art mediums and techniques in a supportive, creative environment. Perfect for self-expression and skill building.

title: Meditation Class
description: Mindfulness and meditation for children and adults
details: Learn mindfulness and meditation techniques to reduce stress and improve focus. Classes for both children and adults.
